---
title: "Property Tax Assessment Regressivity"
subtitle: "Seminar — preliminary results"
author: "Saani Rawat (Marquette University)"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: ../../../Quarto/theme-template.scss
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: false
    incremental: false
    smaller: false
    transition: none
---

# Motivation

- {{MOTIVATION_BULLET_1}}
- {{MOTIVATION_BULLET_2}}

# Data

CoreLogic University-of-Cincinnati extract:

- Owner Transfer (transactions)
- Property Characteristics
- Coverage: {{COVERAGE_PLACEHOLDER}}

# Empirical Strategy

$$
y_{it} = \alpha + \beta D_{it} + \gamma X_{it} + \mu_i + \lambda_t + \varepsilon_{it}
$$

# Main results

(Insert manuscript table T2 here)

# Trend in prices

![](../manuscript/figures/F1_median_price_trend.pdf)

# Takeaways

1. {{TAKEAWAY_1}}
2. {{TAKEAWAY_2}}

# Thank you

saani.rawat@marquette.edu
